title: In the conditions of modern war, it is technology, engineering...
title_en: In the conditions of modern war, it is technology, engineering...
title_uk: В умовах сучасної війни це техніка, техніка...
description: In the conditions of modern war, it is technology, engineering solutions and the speed of adaptation to new challenges that determine the advantage. The Ukrainian defense-industrial complex demonstrates dynamic development, and gunsmiths respond promptly to changes on the battlefield every day. Hundreds of enterprises and hundreds of thousands of specialists work in the industry, providing the Defense Forces with modern weapons and equipment. High-precision systems,...
description_en: In the conditions of modern war, it is technology, engineering solutions and the speed of adaptation to new challenges that determine the advantage. The Ukrainian defense-industrial complex demonstrates dynamic development, and gunsmiths respond promptly to changes on the battlefield every day. Hundreds of enterprises and hundreds of thousands of specialists work in the industry, providing the Defense Forces with modern weapons and equipment. High-precision systems,...
description_uk: В умовах сучасної війни саме технології, інженерні рішення та швидкість адаптації до нових викликів визначають перевагу. Український оборонно-промисловий комплекс демонструє динамічний розвиток, а зброярі щодня оперативно реагують на зміни на полі бою. У галузі працюють сотні підприємств і сотні тисяч фахівців, які забезпечують Сили оборони сучасним озброєнням і технікою. Високоточні системи,...

title: "Oh, what a trip": the moment of arrival at a chemical plant in the...

description: "Oh, what a trip": the moment of arrival at a chemical plant in the Vologda region of the Russian Federation was caught on video. Local "correspondents", however, are a little unhappy with their soldiers. Dialogue: — What, bitch, can't get caught? - Yes, because there are only disabled people. And how can you disagree? 🤣

title: Zaporizhzhia: 98 drones launched
description: At least 2 killed, 6 injured in Russian strikes across Ukraine despite Easter ceasefire. Russian forces launched 98 drones against Ukraine overnight, of which 65 were Shahed-type drones, the Air Force said. Photo: Zaporizhzhia Oblast Military Administration

description: 87 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED During the night (from 00:10 on April 13), the enemy attacked 98 attack UAVs of the Shahed, Gerbera, Italmas type and UAVs of other types from the directions: Orel, Bryansk, Kursk, Millerovo, Primorsko-Akhtarsk - Russian Federation, Gvardiyske - TOT AR Crimea, about 65 of them - "shahedis". The air attack was repulsed by aviation, anti-aircraft missile forces, EW units and unmanned systems,...

title: 🇭🇺 Minister of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine Andriy Sybiga congratulated...
title_en: 🇭🇺 Minister of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine Andriy Sybiga congratulated...

description: 🇭🇺 Minister of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine Andriy Sybiga congratulated Peter Magyar and the TISZA party on the victory in the parliamentary elections in Hungary. 💬 "Congratulations to the Hungarian people on today's democratic, transparent and historic parliamentary elections. The record high turnout indicates a turning point for Hungary. We wish the winners, Peter Magyar and the TISZA party, success in realizing their expectations...
description_en: 🇭🇺 Minister of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine Andriy Sybiga congratulated Peter Magyar and the TISZA party on the victory in the parliamentary elections in Hungary. 💬 "Congratulations to the Hungarian people on today's democratic, transparent and historic parliamentary elections. The record high turnout indicates a turning point for Hungary. We wish the winners, Peter Magyar and the TISZA party, success in realizing their expectations...
description_uk: 🇭🇺 Міністр закордонних справ України Андрій Сибіга привітав Петера Мадяра та партію TISZA з перемогою на парламентських виборах в Угорщині. 💬 "Вітаємо угорський народ із сьогоднішніми демократичними, прозорими та історичними парламентськими виборами. Рекордно висока явка свідчить про переломний момент для Угорщини. Бажаємо переможцям, Петеру Мадяру та партії TISZA, успіхів у реалізації очікувань...

title: Happy Easter! The Resurrection of Christ reminds us of the power of...
title_en: Happy Easter! The Resurrection of Christ reminds us of the power of...
title_uk: Щасливого Великодня! Воскресіння Христове нагадує нам про силу...
description: Happy Easter! The Resurrection of Christ reminds us of the power of goodness and truth, which always defeats darkness. Easter morning brings not only joy - it brings hope that evil will surely be defeated, and there will surely be light ahead. May this holiday bring warmth to every family, unite us, give strength and remind us of the value of life and mutual support. Let the light of this day...
description_en: Happy Easter! The Resurrection of Christ reminds us of the power of goodness and truth, which always defeats darkness. Easter morning brings not only joy - it brings hope that evil will surely be defeated, and there will surely be light ahead. May this holiday bring warmth to every family, unite us, give strength and remind us of the value of life and mutual support. Let the light of this day...
description_uk: Зі світлим святом Великодня! Воскресіння Христове нагадує нам про силу добра і правди, які завжди перемагають темряву. Великодній ранок приносить не тільки радість – він приносить надію, що зло неодмінно зазнає поразки, а попереду обов’язково буде світло. Нехай це свято приносить кожній родині тепло, об’єднує нас, дає силу та нагадує про цінність життя та взаємопідтримки. Хай світло цього дня...

title: Kyiv: When we were preparing this year's Easter greeting, we learned that...
title_en: Kyiv: When we were preparing this year's Easter greeting, we learned that...
title_uk: Київ: Готуючи цьогорічне пасхальне привітання, ми дізналися, що...
description: When we were preparing this year's Easter greeting, we learned that very close by, also on the territory of Sofia of Kyiv, at this very time, the children of defenders from Kyiv and the Kyiv region, whose parents, unfortunately, died in this war, gathered. An excursion, a quest with the search for Easter eggs, freckles and groves, master classes on making stained glass for special guests were prepared by the Platform of Socially Responsible Business...
description_en: When we were preparing this year's Easter greeting, we learned that very close by, also on the territory of Sofia of Kyiv, at this very time, the children of defenders from Kyiv and the Kyiv region, whose parents, unfortunately, died in this war, gathered. An excursion, a quest with the search for Easter eggs, freckles and groves, master classes on making stained glass for special guests were prepared by the Platform of Socially Responsible Business...
description_uk: Коли ми готували цьогорічне великоднє привітання, дізналися, що зовсім поряд, теж на території Софії Київської, у цей самий час зібралися діти захисників із Києва й Київщини, чиї батьки, на жаль, загинули на цій війні. Екскурсію, квест із пошуком писанок, веснянками та гаївками, майстер-класи з виготовлення вітражів для особливих гостей підготувала Платформа соціально відповідального бізнесу...

title: Casualties reported
description: 🤬 Katsaps killed a Ukrainian evacuation group near Gulyaipilskyi 🔄 Despite the so-called "ceasefire", the enemy continues what he was doing. Today, around 5:30 p.m. near Gulyaipilskyi, with the use of fpv drones, snipers killed a group of our wounded. 💬 Another illusion of the partners that the Muscovite wants peace must be shattered. Only by joint power, and not by playing along, can you make the bastards sit down for...
description_en: 🤬 Katsaps killed a Ukrainian evacuation group near Gulyaipilskyi 🔄 Despite the so-called "ceasefire", the enemy continues what he was doing. Today, around 5:30 p.m. near Gulyaipilskyi, with the use of fpv drones, snipers killed a group of our wounded. 💬 Another illusion of the partners that the Muscovite wants peace must be shattered. Only by joint power, and not by playing along, can you make the bastards sit down for...
description_uk: 🤬 Кацапи вбили українську евакуаційну групу поблизу Гуляйпільського 🔄 Незважаючи на так зване "припинення вогню", ворог продовжує те, що і робив. Сьогодні близько 17:30 поблизу Гуляйпілського, з використанням fpv-дронів кацапи вбили групу наших поранених. 💬 Чергові ілюзії партнерів, що москаль хоче миру, мають бути розбиті. Лише спільною силою, а не підіграванням, можна змусити виродків сісти за...

title: We are working with partners to move forward in negotiations and in...

description: We are working with partners to move forward in negotiations and in guaranteeing security. Ukraine remains in constant contact with the American side at various levels. We are preparing very active work in the coming weeks with our European partners as well. On Monday, there will be a detailed report from Rustem Umerov on all agreements in the Middle East, the Gulf, and other countries...
